strengths: Polyglot full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services — directly matching the role's software/infrastructure breadth requirement.
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates active fluency in cutting-edge AI builder tooling.

Founder of GISCollective (Kubernetes-deployed, event-driven open-source platform) shows entrepreneurial drive, product ownership, and the ability to ship and sustain a real platform — aligning with the 'entrepreneurial within larger organizations' preference.
concerns: No explicit Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, though the preference is not a hard requirement.
Director-level IC leadership scope (advising strategic customers, inspiring across orgs) is not yet explicitly demonstrated on the resume.
Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) but not framed at the platform-strategy altitude the role envisions.

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
15+ years of polyglot software and infrastructure engineering
Founder of a production open-source cloud-deployed platform

response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare combination the role explicitly seeks: 15+ years of deep, polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput infrastructure, paired with current, hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — exactly the 'builder, code, and design fluency' the JD calls out. His founding and continued stewardship of GISCollective (an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable open-source GIS platform used by Green Map) evidences the entrepreneurial, product-shipping mindset preferred for this Principal IC role, while talks, workshops, and recurring Refactoring Dojos show he already inspires technical communities — a strong proxy for the inspire-others responsibility. The mix of AWS CDK, micro-services at millions-of-RPS scale, and active agentic-AI tooling positions him credibly to advise on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
